name: Table
description: Displays simple tabular data with semantic table markup and optional scrollable container support.
import: import { Table, THead, TBody, TR, TH, TD, TFoot, TableContainer } from "@salt-ds/core";

variant.description: Body styling variant for table background hierarchy

divider.description: Divider styling variant for table separators

thead.sticky.description: Makes table header sticky when container scrolls

tfoot.sticky.description: Makes table footer sticky when container scrolls

tableContainer.aria-label.description: Optional accessible name override for scrollable container region

tableContainer.aria-labelledby.description: Optional labelled-by override for scrollable container region

slots.children: Compose standard table sections and rows using THead, TBody, TR, TH, TD, and TFoot

keyboard: Tab — moves focus to the scrollable table container when overflow is present
Shift + Tab — moves focus to the previous focusable element from the table container
aria: Use caption as the preferred accessible name for the table
aria-label or aria-labelledby can provide an accessible name when caption is not used
When the container is scrollable, it exposes region semantics with a programmatic accessible name
